# Bug Reports — FR-01: Account Registration

**Generated by:** bug-report-writer skill  
**Date:** 2026-06-16

- `qa-artifacts/test-cases/FR01-test-cases.md`
- `qa-artifacts/execution-results/FR01-execution-results.md`

**Total bugs:** 10

## BUG-001

| Field            | Value                                                                                                                                                                |
| ---------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Bug ID**       | BUG-001                                                                                                                                                              |
| **Feature**      | FR-01 — Account Registration                                                                                                                                         |
| **Linked TCs**   | FR01-EP-001, FR01-EP-020, FR01-BVA-003, FR01-BVA-004, FR01-BVA-005, FR01-BVA-008, FR01-BVA-009, FR01-BVA-010, FR01-BVA-011, FR01-BVA-012, FR01-BVA-015, FR01-BVA-016 |
| **Channel**      | API + State                                                                                                                                                          |
| **Summary**      | POST /api/register inserts user password as plaintext instead of bcrypt hash when storing in DB (per SEC-01)                                                         |
| **Status**       | New                                                                                                                                                                  |
| **Severity**     | Serious                                                                                                                                                              |
| **Priority**     | High                                                                                                                                                                 |
| **Reported by**  | 23127449 - Nguyễn Tấn Phát                                                                                                                                           |
| **Date**         | 2026-06-14                                                                                                                                                           |
| **GitHub Issue** | [#1](https://github.com/phatnguyen975/eshop-sut/issues/1)                                                                                                            |

### Environment

| Component    | Value                 |
| ------------ | --------------------- |
| OS / Device  | Ubuntu (WSL)          |
| Runtime Env  | N/A (cURL test)       |
| Backend      | http://localhost:3000 |
| Frontend/App | N/A (API-only test)   |
| Test Account | ep001@test.com        |

### Steps to Reproduce

1. Ensure the EShop backend is running at http://localhost:3000.
2. Send the following request:
   ```bash
   curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/register \
      -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
      -d '{"name":"Nguyen Van A","email":"ep001@test.com","password":"Test@123"}'
   ```
3. Observe the HTTP response status code.
4. Observe the response body.
5. Query the database:
   ```bash
   sqlite3 backend/database.sqlite "SELECT password FROM users WHERE email='ep001@test.com';"
   ```

**This root cause also causes the following TCs to fail:** FR01-EP-020, FR01-BVA-003, FR01-BVA-004, FR01-BVA-005, FR01-BVA-008, FR01-BVA-009, FR01-BVA-010, FR01-BVA-011, FR01-BVA-012, FR01-BVA-015, FR01-BVA-016.

### Expected Behavior

Per **SEC-01**:

> Passwords must not be stored as plaintext.

Specifically (based on Primary TC):

- HTTP 200 OK
- Response body: `{"message": "User registered successfully", "id": <positive integer>}`
- DB state: Password stored as bcrypt hash (starts with `$2`).

### Actual Behavior

- HTTP Status: `HTTP 200`
- Response Body:
  ```json
  { "message": "User registered successfully", "id": 1 }
  ```
- DB State: Password is stored as plaintext `Test@123` instead of a bcrypt hash.

### Severity Rationale

**Serious:** SEC-01 is explicitly violated, storing user passwords in plaintext which poses a massive security vulnerability.

### Priority Rationale

**High:** Security vulnerability that exposes user credentials, blocking secure deployment.

## BUG-002

| Field            | Value                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| ---------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Bug ID**       | BUG-002                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| **Feature**      | FR-01 — Account Registration                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| **Linked TCs**   | FR01-EP-002, FR01-EP-003, FR01-EP-004, FR01-EP-005, FR01-EP-006, FR01-EP-008, FR01-EP-009, FR01-EP-010, FR01-EP-011, FR01-EP-012, FR01-EP-013, FR01-EP-014, FR01-EP-015, FR01-EP-016, FR01-EP-017, FR01-BVA-001, FR01-BVA-002, FR01-BVA-006, FR01-BVA-007, FR01-BVA-013, FR01-BVA-014, FR01-BVA-017, FR01-BVA-018 |
| **Channel**      | API                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| **Summary**      | POST /api/register returns HTTP 200 instead of HTTP 400 when missing/invalid fields are submitted (per FR-01)                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| **Status**       | New                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| **Severity**     | Serious                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| **Priority**     | High                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| **Reported by**  | 23127449 - Nguyễn Tấn Phát                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| **Date**         | 2026-06-14                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| **GitHub Issue** | [#2](https://github.com/phatnguyen975/eshop-sut/issues/2)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |

### Environment

| Component    | Value                 |
| ------------ | --------------------- |
| OS / Device  | Ubuntu (WSL)          |
| Runtime Env  | N/A (cURL test)       |
| Backend      | http://localhost:3000 |
| Frontend/App | N/A (API-only test)   |
| Test Account | ep002@test.com        |

### Steps to Reproduce

1. Ensure the EShop backend is running at http://localhost:3000.
2. Send the following request:
   ```bash
   curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/register \
      -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
      -d '{"name":"","email":"ep002@test.com","password":"Test@123"}'
   ```
3. Observe the HTTP response status code.
4. Observe the response body.

**This root cause also causes the following TCs to fail:** FR01-EP-003, FR01-EP-004, FR01-EP-005, FR01-EP-006, FR01-EP-008, FR01-EP-009, FR01-EP-010, FR01-EP-011, FR01-EP-012, FR01-EP-013, FR01-EP-014, FR01-EP-015, FR01-EP-016, FR01-EP-017, FR01-BVA-001, FR01-BVA-002, FR01-BVA-006, FR01-BVA-007, FR01-BVA-013, FR01-BVA-014, FR01-BVA-017, FR01-BVA-018.

### Expected Behavior

Per **FR-01**:

> The system must validate input fields (Name is required, Email must be valid format, Password strength requirements, etc).

Specifically (based on Primary TC):

- HTTP 400 Bad Request
- Response body: Error message indicating Name is required.
- DB state: No new user created in DB.

### Actual Behavior

- HTTP Status: `HTTP 200`
- Response Body:
  ```json
  { "message": "User registered successfully", "id": 4 }
  ```

### Severity Rationale

**Serious:** Complete absence of backend input validation on the registration endpoint allows garbage data and empty required fields to be saved.

### Priority Rationale

**High:** Data integrity risk affecting core user registration flow.

## BUG-003

| Field            | Value                                                                                               |
| ---------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Bug ID**       | BUG-003                                                                                             |
| **Feature**      | FR-01 — Account Registration                                                                        |
| **Linked TCs**   | FR01-EP-007                                                                                         |
| **Channel**      | API                                                                                                 |
| **Summary**      | POST /api/register returns HTTP 200 instead of HTTP 409 when email already exists in DB (per FR-01) |
| **Status**       | New                                                                                                 |
| **Severity**     | Serious                                                                                             |
| **Priority**     | High                                                                                                |
| **Reported by**  | 23127449 - Nguyễn Tấn Phát                                                                          |
| **Date**         | 2026-06-14                                                                                          |
| **GitHub Issue** | [#3](https://github.com/phatnguyen975/eshop-sut/issues/3)                                           |

### Environment

| Component    | Value                 |
| ------------ | --------------------- |
| OS / Device  | Ubuntu (WSL)          |
| Runtime Env  | N/A (cURL test)       |
| Backend      | http://localhost:3000 |
| Frontend/App | N/A (API-only test)   |
| Test Account | test@eshop.com        |

### Steps to Reproduce

1. Ensure the EShop backend is running at http://localhost:3000.
2. Send the following request with an already registered email:
   ```bash
   curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/register \
      -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
      -d '{"name":"Duplicate User","email":"test@eshop.com","password":"Test@123"}'
   ```
3. Observe the HTTP response status code.
4. Observe the response body.

### Expected Behavior

Per **FR-01**:

> System must reject registration if email already exists in the system.

Specifically (based on Primary TC):

- HTTP 409 Conflict
- Response body: `{"message": "Email already exists"}`
- DB state: No additional user record created.

### Actual Behavior

- HTTP Status: `HTTP 200`
- Response Body:
  ```json
  { "message": "User registered successfully", "id": 5 }
  ```

### Severity Rationale

**Serious:** Allows multiple users to register with the exact same email, violating core business rules and breaking login functionality.

### Priority Rationale

**High:** Causes critical data integrity issues for the authentication flow.

## BUG-004

| Field            | Value                                                                                                                         |
| ---------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Bug ID**       | BUG-004                                                                                                                       |
| **Feature**      | FR-01 — Account Registration                                                                                                  |
| **Linked TCs**   | FR01-EP-001, FR01-BVA-003                                                                                                     |
| **Channel**      | UI                                                                                                                            |
| **Summary**      | Registration form rejects valid standard special characters in password instead of accepting them when submitting (per FR-01) |
| **Status**       | New                                                                                                                           |
| **Severity**     | Medium                                                                                                                        |
| **Priority**     | High                                                                                                                          |
| **Reported by**  | 23127449 - Nguyễn Tấn Phát                                                                                                    |
| **Date**         | 2026-06-14                                                                                                                    |
| **GitHub Issue** | [#4](https://github.com/phatnguyen975/eshop-sut/issues/4)                                                                     |

### Environment

| Component    | Value                 |
| ------------ | --------------------- |
| OS / Device  | Ubuntu (WSL)          |
| Runtime Env  | Edge (Web Browser)    |
| Backend      | http://localhost:3000 |
| Frontend/App | http://localhost:5173 |
| Test Account | ep001@test.com        |

### Steps to Reproduce

1. Navigate to: http://localhost:5173/register
2. Fill `Name` with `Nguyen Van A`
3. Fill `Email` with `ep001@test.com`
4. Fill `Password` with `Test@123`
5. Click the "Register" button.
6. Observe: UI validation error message for the password field.

**This root cause also causes the following TCs to fail:** FR01-BVA-003.

### Expected Behavior

Per **FR-01**:

> Password must contain at least one special character from the allowed set.

Specifically (based on Primary TC):

- UI: Form is submitted successfully without validation errors for standard special characters like `@`.

### Actual Behavior

- UI: Password incorrectly rejected due to standard special character (requires space instead).

### Severity Rationale

**Medium:** Incorrect UI validation blocks valid passwords, deviating from SRS.

### Priority Rationale

**High:** Blocks users from registering with common, standard strong passwords.

## BUG-005

| Field            | Value                                                                                                                                 |
| ---------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Bug ID**       | BUG-005                                                                                                                               |
| **Feature**      | FR-01 — Account Registration                                                                                                          |
| **Linked TCs**   | FR01-EP-002, FR01-EP-008, FR01-EP-016                                                                                                 |
| **Channel**      | UI                                                                                                                                    |
| **Summary**      | Registration form uses native HTML5 browser tooltip instead of custom inline error message when required fields are empty (per FR-22) |
| **Status**       | New                                                                                                                                   |
| **Severity**     | Cosmetic                                                                                                                              |
| **Priority**     | Low                                                                                                                                   |
| **Reported by**  | 23127449 - Nguyễn Tấn Phát                                                                                                            |
| **Date**         | 2026-06-14                                                                                                                            |
| **GitHub Issue** | [#5](https://github.com/phatnguyen975/eshop-sut/issues/5)                                                                             |

### Environment

| Component    | Value                 |
| ------------ | --------------------- |
| OS / Device  | Ubuntu (WSL)          |
| Runtime Env  | Edge (Web Browser)    |
| Backend      | http://localhost:3000 |
| Frontend/App | http://localhost:5173 |
| Test Account | ep002@test.com        |

### Steps to Reproduce

1. Navigate to: http://localhost:5173/register
2. Fill `Name` with `""` (leave empty)
3. Fill `Email` with `ep002@test.com`
4. Fill `Password` with `Test@123`
5. Click the "Register" button.
6. Observe: Error presentation format.

**This root cause also causes the following TCs to fail:** FR01-EP-008, FR01-EP-016.

### Expected Behavior

Per **FR-22**:

> Forms must display custom inline error messages for missing required fields.

Specifically (based on Primary TC):

- UI: Custom inline error message displayed for the empty `Name` field.

### Actual Behavior

- UI: Relies on native browser HTML5 tooltip instead of custom inline error message.

### Severity Rationale

**Cosmetic:** Does not prevent registration but deviates from the expected custom UI design language.

### Priority Rationale

**Low:** Purely a visual / UX inconsistency.

## BUG-006

| Field            | Value                                                                                                                  |
| ---------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Bug ID**       | BUG-006                                                                                                                |
| **Feature**      | FR-01 — Account Registration                                                                                           |
| **Linked TCs**   | FR01-EP-004, FR01-EP-005, FR01-EP-006, FR01-EP-007                                                                     |
| **Channel**      | UI                                                                                                                     |
| **Summary**      | Registration form displays weak password error instead of invalid email format error when email is invalid (per FR-01) |
| **Status**       | New                                                                                                                    |
| **Severity**     | Medium                                                                                                                 |
| **Priority**     | Medium                                                                                                                 |
| **Reported by**  | 23127449 - Nguyễn Tấn Phát                                                                                             |
| **Date**         | 2026-06-14                                                                                                             |
| **GitHub Issue** | [#6](https://github.com/phatnguyen975/eshop-sut/issues/6)                                                              |

### Environment

| Component    | Value                 |
| ------------ | --------------------- |
| OS / Device  | Ubuntu (WSL)          |
| Runtime Env  | Edge (Web Browser)    |
| Backend      | http://localhost:3000 |
| Frontend/App | http://localhost:5173 |
| Test Account | invalidemail          |

### Steps to Reproduce

1. Navigate to: http://localhost:5173/register
2. Fill `Name` with `Nguyen Van A`
3. Fill `Email` with `invalidemail`
4. Fill `Password` with `Test@123`
5. Click the "Register" button.
6. Observe: Which validation error is displayed first.

**This root cause also causes the following TCs to fail:** FR01-EP-005, FR01-EP-006, FR01-EP-007.

### Expected Behavior

Per **FR-01**:

> Must validate all fields correctly and show specific inline errors for invalid email format.

Specifically (based on Primary TC):

- UI: Inline error on Email field indicating invalid email format.

### Actual Behavior

- UI: Displayed weak password error instead of invalid email format error.

### Severity Rationale

**Medium:** Confuses users by showing unrelated error messages due to incorrect execution order or shared validation state.

### Priority Rationale

**Medium:** UX issue that misleads users trying to fix form errors.

## BUG-007

| Field            | Value                                                                                      |
| ---------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| **Bug ID**       | BUG-007                                                                                    |
| **Feature**      | FR-01 — Account Registration                                                               |
| **Linked TCs**   | FR01-EP-018, FR01-EP-019, FR01-DOM-PW                                                      |
| **Channel**      | UI + DOM                                                                                   |
| **Summary**      | Registration form is completely missing the Confirm Password input field required by FR-01 |
| **Status**       | New                                                                                        |
| **Severity**     | Medium                                                                                     |
| **Priority**     | High                                                                                       |
| **Reported by**  | 23127449 - Nguyễn Tấn Phát                                                                 |
| **Date**         | 2026-06-14                                                                                 |
| **GitHub Issue** | [#7](https://github.com/phatnguyen975/eshop-sut/issues/7)                                  |

### Environment

| Component    | Value                 |
| ------------ | --------------------- |
| OS / Device  | Ubuntu (WSL)          |
| Runtime Env  | Edge (Web Browser)    |
| Backend      | http://localhost:3000 |
| Frontend/App | http://localhost:5173 |
| Test Account | N/A                   |

### Steps to Reproduce

1. Navigate to: http://localhost:5173/register
2. Observe: The available input fields on the registration form.

**This root cause also causes the following TCs to fail:** FR01-EP-019, FR01-DOM-PW.

### Expected Behavior

Per **FR-01**:

> The form must have Password and Confirm Password inputs.

Specifically (based on Primary TC):

- UI: "Confirm Password" field is visible and validates against the "Password" field.

### Actual Behavior

- UI: Confirm Password input field is entirely missing from the UI.

### Severity Rationale

**Medium:** Missing UI element explicitly required by the SRS, removing the ability to prevent typos in passwords during registration.

### Priority Rationale

**High:** Missing a core standard form component on the registration flow.

## BUG-008

| Field            | Value                                                                |
| ---------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Bug ID**       | BUG-008                                                              |
| **Feature**      | FR-01 — Account Registration                                         |
| **Linked TCs**   | FR01-DOM-H1                                                          |
| **Channel**      | DOM                                                                  |
| **Summary**      | Registration page has 0 `<h1>` tags instead of exactly 1 (per FR-21) |
| **Status**       | New                                                                  |
| **Severity**     | Cosmetic                                                             |
| **Priority**     | Low                                                                  |
| **Reported by**  | 23127449 - Nguyễn Tấn Phát                                           |
| **Date**         | 2026-06-14                                                           |
| **GitHub Issue** | [#8](https://github.com/phatnguyen975/eshop-sut/issues/8)            |

### Environment

| Component    | Value                 |
| ------------ | --------------------- |
| OS / Device  | Ubuntu (WSL)          |
| Runtime Env  | Edge (Web Browser)    |
| Backend      | http://localhost:3000 |
| Frontend/App | http://localhost:5173 |
| Test Account | N/A                   |

### Steps to Reproduce

1. Navigate to: http://localhost:5173/register
2. Open DevTools: F12 → Console tab.
3. Paste the following and press Enter:

   ```js
   (function FR01DOMChecks() {
     "use strict";

     let pass = 0,
       fail = 0;
     const results = [];

     function check(tcId, description, expected, actualFn) {
       let actual, status;
       try {
         actual = actualFn();
         const ok =
           expected === "EXISTS"
             ? actual !== null && actual !== undefined && actual !== "NOT_FOUND"
             : String(actual) === String(expected);
         status = ok ? "PASS" : "FAIL";
       } catch (e) {
         actual = "ERROR: " + e.message;
         status = "FAIL";
       }
       status === "PASS" ? pass++ : fail++;
       results.push({ tcId, description, expected, actual, status });
     }

     // DOM-H1: Exactly 1 <h1> tag (per FR-21 — all web pages)
     check("FR01-DOM-H1", "Page has exactly 1 <h1> tag (per FR-21)", "1", () =>
       String(document.querySelectorAll("h1").length),
     );

     console.log(
       "%c━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━",
       "font-weight: bold",
     );
     console.log(
       "%c FR-01 DOM CHECK RESULTS",
       "font-weight: bold; font-size: 14px",
     );
     console.log(
       "%c━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━",
       "font-weight: bold",
     );

     results.forEach((r) => {
       const color =
         r.status === "PASS"
           ? "color: green; font-weight: bold"
           : "color: red; font-weight: bold";
       console.log(
         `%c[${r.status}] %c${r.tcId} — ${r.description}`,
         color,
         "color: inherit",
       );
       console.log(`       Expected: ${r.expected} | Actual: ${r.actual}`);
     });

     console.log(
       "%c━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━",
       "font-weight: bold",
     );
     console.log(
       `TOTAL: %c${pass} PASS%c | %c${fail} FAIL`,
       "color: green; font-weight: bold",
       "color: inherit",
       "color: red; font-weight: bold",
     );
   })();
   ```

4. Observe the FAIL output in the console.

### Expected Behavior

Per **FR-21**:

> Every web page must have exactly one `<h1>` tag.

Specifically:

- DOM should contain 1 `<h1>` element.

### Actual Behavior

- UI: DOM has 0 `<h1>` elements.

### Severity Rationale

**Cosmetic:** DOM structure deviation that doesn't block functional workflows.

### Priority Rationale

**Low:** Minor SEO / Accessibility deviation.

## BUG-009

| Field            | Value                                                                                            |
| ---------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| **Bug ID**       | BUG-009                                                                                          |
| **Feature**      | FR-01 — Account Registration                                                                     |
| **Linked TCs**   | FR01-DOM-EMAIL                                                                                   |
| **Channel**      | DOM                                                                                              |
| **Summary**      | Registration page email input lacks `type="email"` attribute instead of including it (per FR-22) |
| **Status**       | New                                                                                              |
| **Severity**     | Cosmetic                                                                                         |
| **Priority**     | Low                                                                                              |
| **Reported by**  | 23127449 - Nguyễn Tấn Phát                                                                       |
| **Date**         | 2026-06-14                                                                                       |
| **GitHub Issue** | [#9](https://github.com/phatnguyen975/eshop-sut/issues/9)                                        |

### Environment

| Component    | Value                 |
| ------------ | --------------------- |
| OS / Device  | Ubuntu (WSL)          |
| Runtime Env  | Edge (Web Browser)    |
| Backend      | http://localhost:3000 |
| Frontend/App | http://localhost:5173 |
| Test Account | N/A                   |

### Steps to Reproduce

1. Navigate to: http://localhost:5173/register
2. Open DevTools: F12 → Console tab.
3. Paste the following and press Enter:

   ```js
   (function FR01DOMChecks() {
     "use strict";

     let pass = 0,
       fail = 0;
     const results = [];

     function check(tcId, description, expected, actualFn) {
       let actual, status;
       try {
         actual = actualFn();
         const ok =
           expected === "EXISTS"
             ? actual !== null && actual !== undefined && actual !== "NOT_FOUND"
             : String(actual) === String(expected);
         status = ok ? "PASS" : "FAIL";
       } catch (e) {
         actual = "ERROR: " + e.message;
         status = "FAIL";
       }
       status === "PASS" ? pass++ : fail++;
       results.push({ tcId, description, expected, actual, status });
     }

     // DOM-EMAIL: Email input type="email" (per FR-22)
     check(
       "FR01-DOM-EMAIL",
       'Email input has type="email" (per FR-22)',
       "email",
       () => {
         const el =
           document.querySelector(
             'input[name="email"], input[autocomplete="email"]',
           ) || document.querySelector('input[type="email"]');
         return el
           ? el.type
           : "No email field found or input type is not email";
       },
     );

     console.log(
       "%c━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━",
       "font-weight: bold",
     );
     console.log(
       "%c FR-01 DOM CHECK RESULTS",
       "font-weight: bold; font-size: 14px",
     );
     console.log(
       "%c━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━",
       "font-weight: bold",
     );

     results.forEach((r) => {
       const color =
         r.status === "PASS"
           ? "color: green; font-weight: bold"
           : "color: red; font-weight: bold";
       console.log(
         `%c[${r.status}] %c${r.tcId} — ${r.description}`,
         color,
         "color: inherit",
       );
       console.log(`       Expected: ${r.expected} | Actual: ${r.actual}`);
     });

     console.log(
       "%c━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━",
       "font-weight: bold",
     );
     console.log(
       `TOTAL: %c${pass} PASS%c | %c${fail} FAIL`,
       "color: green; font-weight: bold",
       "color: inherit",
       "color: red; font-weight: bold",
     );
   })();
   ```

4. Observe the FAIL output in the console.

### Expected Behavior

Per **FR-22**:

> Email inputs must use `type="email"`.

Specifically:

- DOM should return "email" for the input type.

### Actual Behavior

- UI: Email input has type text or lacks `type="email"`.

### Severity Rationale

**Cosmetic:** Deviates from standard HTML5 semantics.

### Priority Rationale

**Low:** Mobile keyboard optimizations won't trigger for this field.

## BUG-010

| Field            | Value                                                                                             |
| ---------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Bug ID**       | BUG-010                                                                                           |
| **Feature**      | FR-01 — Account Registration                                                                      |
| **Linked TCs**   | FR01-DOM-STAR                                                                                     |
| **Channel**      | DOM                                                                                               |
| **Summary**      | Registration page required fields lack `*` marker in labels instead of including them (per FR-22) |
| **Status**       | New                                                                                               |
| **Severity**     | Cosmetic                                                                                          |
| **Priority**     | Low                                                                                               |
| **Reported by**  | 23127449 - Nguyễn Tấn Phát                                                                        |
| **Date**         | 2026-06-14                                                                                        |
| **GitHub Issue** | [#10](https://github.com/phatnguyen975/eshop-sut/issues/10)                                       |

### Environment

| Component    | Value                 |
| ------------ | --------------------- |
| OS / Device  | Ubuntu (WSL)          |
| Runtime Env  | Edge (Web Browser)    |
| Backend      | http://localhost:3000 |
| Frontend/App | http://localhost:5173 |
| Test Account | N/A                   |

### Steps to Reproduce

1. Navigate to: http://localhost:5173/register
2. Open DevTools: F12 → Console tab.
3. Paste the following and press Enter:

   ```js
   (function FR01DOMChecks() {
     "use strict";

     let pass = 0,
       fail = 0;
     const results = [];

     function check(tcId, description, expected, actualFn) {
       let actual, status;
       try {
         actual = actualFn();
         const ok =
           expected === "EXISTS"
             ? actual !== null && actual !== undefined && actual !== "NOT_FOUND"
             : String(actual) === String(expected);
         status = ok ? "PASS" : "FAIL";
       } catch (e) {
         actual = "ERROR: " + e.message;
         status = "FAIL";
       }
       status === "PASS" ? pass++ : fail++;
       results.push({ tcId, description, expected, actual, status });
     }

     // DOM-STAR: Required fields have * label marker (per FR-22)
     check(
       "FR01-DOM-STAR",
       "Required fields have * in label (per FR-22)",
       "Has * markers",
       () => {
         const labels = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll("label"));
         const stars = labels.filter((l) => l.textContent.trim().includes("*"));
         if (stars.length > 0) return "Has * markers";
         return "0 labels with *";
       },
     );

     console.log(
       "%c━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━",
       "font-weight: bold",
     );
     console.log(
       "%c FR-01 DOM CHECK RESULTS",
       "font-weight: bold; font-size: 14px",
     );
     console.log(
       "%c━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━",
       "font-weight: bold",
     );

     results.forEach((r) => {
       const color =
         r.status === "PASS"
           ? "color: green; font-weight: bold"
           : "color: red; font-weight: bold";
       console.log(
         `%c[${r.status}] %c${r.tcId} — ${r.description}`,
         color,
         "color: inherit",
       );
       console.log(`       Expected: ${r.expected} | Actual: ${r.actual}`);
     });

     console.log(
       "%c━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━",
       "font-weight: bold",
     );
     console.log(
       `TOTAL: %c${pass} PASS%c | %c${fail} FAIL`,
       "color: green; font-weight: bold",
       "color: inherit",
       "color: red; font-weight: bold",
     );
   })();
   ```

4. Observe the FAIL output in the console.

### Expected Behavior

Per **FR-22**:

> Required fields must be marked with a `*` in their labels.

Specifically:

- UI labels should visually show `*`.

### Actual Behavior

- UI: 0 labels found with `*`.

### Severity Rationale

**Cosmetic:** Visual UX deviation from SRS.

### Priority Rationale

**Low:** Minor UX inconsistency.
